name: Appeal Bond Costs Boise vs Murray

mainEntity.name: Cost of denied claim appeal bond in Boise ID vs Murray UT?
mainEntity.text: Cost of denied claim appeal bond in Boise ID vs Murray UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: No bond for comp appeals. Idaho: May require supersedeas bond for stay[1].

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray UT appeals bond-free; Boise ID varies by amount. Cross-state claims complex[1].
